content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a datasheet for a product called "Shielded Power Inductors - XAL7030". It contains: - Header with logos and document number. - Main title. - A product image on the left. - Key features list on the right. - Detailed specifications text. - A table with part numbers and electrical characteristics. - A section explaining ordering codes and packaging. - Footer with company contact information and legal text. **2. Break down the content into logical sections:** * **Header:** * Logos: Web page, Sample & buy, Tools & software, Support & FAQ. * Document number: 863-1. * **Title:** Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030. * **Left Column (Image):** * RoHS/REACH Compliant logo. * Halogen Free logo. * AEC Q200 +125°C logo. * Product image showing four inductors labeled C161, C222, C472, C103. * **Right Column (Features & Specs):** * Bullet points: High current, AEC-Q200 qualified, Soft saturation. * Designer's Kit info. * Core material: Composite. * Environmental: RoHS compliant, halogen free. * Terminations: RoHS compliant tin-silver. * Weight: 0.83 – 0.86 g. * Operating voltage: 60 V. * Ambient temperature: -40°C to +125°C. * Maximum part temperature: +165°C. * Storage temperature: -55°C to +165°C. * Resistance to soldering heat: Max three 40 second reflows at +260°C. * Moisture Sensitivity Level (MSL): 1. * Packaging: 400/7" reel; 1500/13" reel. * PCB washing info. * **Table:** * Columns: Part number, Inductance (±20%), DCR (mOhms) typ/max, SRF typ (MHz), Isat (A), Irms (A) 20°C rise / 40°C rise. * Rows: Data for various part numbers (XAL7030-161ME, etc.). * **Irms Testing Section:** * Title: Irms Testing. * Description: Irms testing performed on 0.75 inch wide x 0.25 inch thick copper traces. * Note: Temperature rise is highly dependent on many factors. * **Ordering & Packaging Info:** * Note 1: When ordering, specify termination and packaging code. * Example: XAL7030-103MEC. * Termination codes: E (Halogen free), T (RoHS tin-silver-copper), S (non-RoHS tin-lead). * Packaging codes: C (7" machine-ready reel), B (Less than full reel), D (13" machine-ready reel). * **Additional Notes:** * Note 2: Inductance tested at 1 MHz. * Note 3: DCR measured on a micro-ohmmeter. * Note 4: SRF measured using Agilent/HP 4395A. * Note 5: DC current at 25°C. * Note 6: Current that causes specified temperature rise. * Note 7: Voltage capability varies. * Note 8: Electrical specifications at 25°C. * Reference to Doc 362 for Soldering Surface Mount Components. * **Footer:** * Coilcraft logo. * Website: www.coilcraft.com. * Contact info: US, UK, Taiwan, China, Singapore. * Document info: Document 863-1, Revised 12/16/25. * Copyright and disclaimer text. **3. Format as JSON:** I will structure the JSON to reflect the layout and content hierarchy. ```json [{"bbox": [45, 5, 126, 32], "category": "header", "text": "Web page"}, {"bbox": [162, 5, 235, 28], "category": "header", "text": "Sample & buy"}, {"bbox": [269, 5, 346, 28], "category": "header", "text": "Tools & software"}, {"bbox": [380, 5, 454, 30], "category": "header", "text": "Support & FAQ"}, {"bbox": [776, 10, 913, 26], "category": "header", "text": "Document 863-1"}, {"bbox": [19, 77, 68, 134], "category": "text", "text": "RoHS/REACH COMPLIANT"}, {"bbox": [85, 71, 912, 119], "category": "title", "text": "Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030"}, {"bbox": [19, 142, 68, 200], "category": "text", "text": "Halogen Free"}, {"bbox": [19, 208, 68, 266], "category": "text", "text": "AEC Q200 +125°C"}, {"bbox": [86, 180, 484, 454], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [510, 179, 727, 193], "category": "text", "text": "• High current and very low DCR"}, {"bbox": [511, 193, 657, 206], "category": "text", "text": "• AEC-Q200 qualified"}, {"bbox": [510, 206, 902, 221], "category": "text", "text": "• Soft saturation makes them ideal for VRM/VRD applications."}, {"bbox": [510, 229, 800, 243], "category": "text", "text": "Designer's Kit C441 contains 3 each of all values"}, {"bbox": [511, 243, 667, 255], "category": "text", "text": "Core material Composite"}, {"bbox": [511, 255, 782, 267], "category": "text", "text": "Environmental RoHS compliant, halogen free"}, {"bbox": [510, 267, 912, 291], "category": "text", "text": "Terminations RoHS compliant tin-silver (96.5/3.5) over copper. Other terminations available at additional cost."}, {"bbox": [511, 291, 642, 304], "category": "text", "text": "Weight 0.83 – 0.86 g"}, {"bbox": [511, 303, 666, 316], "category": "text", "text": "Operating voltage: 60 V$^{7}$"}, {"bbox": [510, 315, 911, 341], "category": "text", "text": "Ambient temperature $-40^{\\circ}C$ to $+125^{\\circ}C$ with ($40^{\\circ}C$ rise) Irms current. Maximum part temperature $+165^{\\circ}C$ (ambient + temp rise). Derating."}, {"bbox": [511, 341, 821, 354], "category": "text", "text": "Storage temperature Component: $-55^{\\circ}C$ to $+165^{\\circ}C$."}, {"bbox": [511, 352, 753, 364], "category": "text", "text": "Tape and reel packaging: $-55^{\\circ}C$ to $+80^{\\circ}C$"}, {"bbox": [510, 364, 876, 388], "category": "text", "text": "Resistance to soldering heat Max three 40 second reflows at +260°C, parts cooled to room temperature between cycles"}, {"bbox": [510, 388, 894, 410], "category": "text", "text": "Moisture Sensitivity Level (MSL) 1 (unlimited floor life at <30°C / 85% relative humidity)"}, {"bbox": [510, 410, 877, 434], "category": "text", "text": "Packaging 400/7\" reel; 1500/13\" reel Plastic tape: 16 mm wide, 0.3 mm thick, 12 mm pocket spacing, 3.3 mm pocket depth"}, {"bbox": [510, 434, 895, 458], "category": "text", "text": "PCB washing Tested to MIL-STD-202 Method 215 plus an additional aqueous wash. RoHS compliant tin-silver over copper terminations.\nSpecial order: T = RoHS tin-silver-copper (95.5/4/0.5) or S = non-RoHS tin-lead (63/37)."}, {"bbox": [99, 753, 478, 794], "category": "text", "text": "Packaging: C = 7\" machine-ready reel.
